productDisplayName: Clarks Men Rocco Fuse Black Leather Black Casual Shoes
description: Blending classic style with a laidback Sports influence, this Rocco Fuse leather shoe from clarks delivers a contemporary look with absolute comfort. The flexible sole that offers all-day wearability, this modern shoe can be worn barefoot as well for that stylish edge. Upper Full leather upper with stitch detailing and toe box overlay for absolute durability, breath ability, comfort and style Lacing system with trims for eyelets offering a snug, customized Fit Hairsheep inner lining for absolute comfort and abrasion-free lining Brand badge on lateral ankle for style PU foxing for durability Midsole PU midsole for lightweight, flexible comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber panels stacked together to create the outsole for absolute grip and traction Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Brush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
